import io
import string
import list

fn remove_first(_ xs: List<Int>, _ val: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut found = false
  mut i = 0
  while i < xs.len()
    let elem = match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if not found and elem == val
      found = true
    else
      result = list.push(result, elem)
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn sort_desc(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut remaining = xs
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  while remaining.len() > 0
    let m = match list.max(remaining)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    result = list.push(result, m)
    remaining = remove_first(remaining, m)
  end
  result
end

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    let tok = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      t
    when None
      ""
    end
    let n = match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    result = list.push(result, n)
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    return Err("missing first line")
  end

  let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    return Err("missing second line")
  end

  let nums = parse_ints(line1)
  let k = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    return Err("invalid K")
  end

  let sorted = sort_desc(nums)

  mut count = k
  if count > sorted.len()
    count = sorted.len()
  end

  mut output = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < count
    let val = match sorted.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if i == 0
      output = "#{val}"
    else
      output = "#{output} #{val}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  println(output)
  Ok(())
end
